case_title: NIESAR AND DIAMOND LLP VS. MARY FOARD WITT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $186.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WITT, MARY FOARD AN INDIVIDUAL
